title: Single-Stage Diffusion NeRF: A Unified Approach to 3D Generation and Reconstruction
problem_statement: Developing a comprehensive model for 3D-aware image synthesis that handles both scene generation and novel view synthesis from images remains challenging due to the need for task-specific methods. Existing approaches rely on two-stage training with pretrained NeRFs as real data, which limits their flexibility and efficiency.

core_ideas.name: Single-Stage Diffusion NeRF (SSDNeRF)
core_ideas.mechanism: A unified approach that employs an expressive diffusion model to learn a generalizable prior of neural radiance fields (NeRF) from multi-view images, using a new single-stage training paradigm with an end-to-end objective that jointly optimizes a NeRF auto-decoder and a latent diffusion model.
target_limitations: lack of unified model for generation and reconstruction
evidence_phrases: single-stage training paradigm with an end-to-end objective that jointly optimizes a NeRF auto-decoder and a latent diffusion model

evidence_refs.quote: single-stage training paradigm with an end-to-end objective that jointly optimizes a NeRF auto-decoder and a latent diffusion model

experiment_signals.setting: unconditional generation and single/sparse-view 3D reconstruction
experiment_signals.claim: SSDNeRF demonstrates robust results comparable to or better than leading task-specific methods in unconditional generation and single/sparse-view 3D reconstruction.
evidence_phrases: SSDNeRF demonstrates robust results comparable to or better than leading task-specific methods in unconditional generation and single/sparse-view 3D reconstruction

evidence_refs.quote: SSDNeRF demonstrates robust results comparable to or better than leading task-specific methods in unconditional generation and single/sparse-view 3D reconstruction

title: CAT4D: Create Anything in 4D with Multi-View Video Diffusion Models
problem_statement: The core technical problem is creating 4D (dynamic 3D) scenes from monocular video. This requires synthesizing novel views at arbitrary camera poses and timestamps, and enabling robust 4D reconstruction from a single video input.

core_ideas.name: Multi-View Video Diffusion Model
core_ideas.mechanism: A model trained on diverse datasets to enable novel view synthesis at any specified camera poses and timestamps, transforming a single monocular video into a multi-view video.
target_limitations: Limited view synthesis from monocular input
evidence_phrases: leverages a multi-view video diffusion model trained on a diverse combination of datasets to enable novel view synthesis at any specified camera poses and timestamps

evidence_refs.quote: leverages a multi-view video diffusion model trained on a diverse combination of datasets to enable novel view synthesis at any specified camera poses and timestamps

core_ideas.name: Deformable 3D Gaussian Representation
core_ideas.mechanism: Optimization of a deformable 3D Gaussian representation for robust 4D reconstruction from the synthesized multi-view video.
target_limitations: Dynamic scene reconstruction from single video
evidence_phrases: enabling robust 4D reconstruction via optimization of a deformable 3D Gaussian representation

evidence_refs.quote: enabling robust 4D reconstruction via optimization of a deformable 3D Gaussian representation

experiment_signals.setting: Novel view synthesis and dynamic scene reconstruction benchmarks
experiment_signals.claim: CAT4D demonstrates competitive performance on novel view synthesis and dynamic scene reconstruction benchmarks.
evidence_phrases: We demonstrate competitive performance on novel view synthesis and dynamic scene reconstruction benchmarks

evidence_refs.quote: We demonstrate competitive performance on novel view synthesis and dynamic scene reconstruction benchmarks

title: Gen3C: 3D-Informed World-Consistent Video Generation with Precise Camera Control
problem_statement: Prior video generation models produce realistic videos but leverage little 3D information, leading to temporal inconsistencies like objects popping in and out. Additionally, camera control is imprecise because camera parameters are mere inputs that the network must interpret, rather than being explicitly guided. This results in a lack of 3D consistency and precise camera trajectory following.

core_ideas.name: 3D Cache Guidance
core_ideas.mechanism: Gen3C is guided by a 3D cache consisting of point clouds obtained by predicting pixel-wise depth of seed images or previously generated frames. This 3D structure is used to condition the generation process.
evidence_phrases: Gen3C is guided by a 3D cache: point clouds obtained by predicting the pixel-wise depth of seed images or previously generated frames.

evidence_refs.quote: Gen3C is guided by a 3D cache: point clouds obtained by predicting the pixel-wise depth of seed images or previously generated frames.

core_ideas.name: Camera-Conditioned Rendering
core_ideas.mechanism: When generating the next frames, Gen3C is conditioned on the 2D renderings of the 3D cache with the new camera trajectory provided by the user, enabling precise camera control without the network inferring structure from pose.
evidence_phrases: When generating the next frames, Gen3C is conditioned on the 2D renderings of the 3D cache with the new camera trajectory provided by the user.

evidence_refs.quote: When generating the next frames, Gen3C is conditioned on the 2D renderings of the 3D cache with the new camera trajectory provided by the user.

core_ideas.name: Focused Generative Power
core_ideas.mechanism: By conditioning on the 3D cache renderings, the model focuses generative power on previously unobserved regions and advancing the scene state, rather than remembering past frames or inferring image structure from camera pose.
evidence_phrases: The model, instead, can focus all its generative power on previously unobserved regions, as well as advancing the scene state to the next frame.

evidence_refs.quote: The model, instead, can focus all its generative power on previously unobserved regions, as well as advancing the scene state to the next frame.

experiment_signals.setting: sparse-view novel view synthesis
experiment_signals.claim: Gen3C achieves state-of-the-art results in sparse-view novel view synthesis, even in challenging settings such as driving scenes and monocular dynamic video.
evidence_phrases: Our results demonstrate more precise camera control than prior work, as well as state-of-the-art results in sparse-view novel view synthesis, even in challenging settings such as driving scenes and monocular dynamic video.

evidence_refs.quote: Our results demonstrate more precise camera control than prior work, as well as state-of-the-art results in sparse-view novel view synthesis, even in challenging settings such as driving scenes and monocular dynamic video.

title: SV4D: Dynamic 3D Content Generation with Multi-Frame and Multi-View Consistency
problem_statement: Generating dynamic 3D content from a monocular video requires multi-frame and multi-view consistency. Previous methods rely on separate generative models for video generation and novel view synthesis, which can be cumbersome and lack unified consistency. SV4D addresses this by designing a unified diffusion model to generate novel view videos of dynamic 3D objects.

core_ideas.name: Unified Latent Video Diffusion Model
core_ideas.mechanism: A single latent video diffusion model generates novel view videos for each frame of a monocular reference video, ensuring temporal consistency, which are then used to optimize an implicit 4D representation (dynamic NeRF).
target_limitations: Separate generative models for video and view synthesis

use the generated novel view videos to optimize an implicit 4D representation (dynamic NeRF) efficiently, without the need for cumbersome SDS-based optimization

evidence_refs.quote: unified diffusion model to generate novel view videos of dynamic 3D objects

core_ideas.name: Dynamic 3D Object Dataset Curation

evidence_refs.quote: To train our unified novel view video generation model, we curate a dynamic 3D object dataset from the existing Objaverse dataset

experiment_signals.setting: Evaluation on multiple datasets and user studies

evidence_refs.quote: Extensive experimental results on multiple datasets and user studies demonstrate SV4D's state-of-the-art performance on novel-view video synthesis as well as 4D generation compared to prior works

title: Representation Alignment for Generation: Training Diffusion Transformers Is Easier Than You Think
problem_statement: Training large-scale diffusion models for generation is bottlenecked by the difficulty of learning high-quality visual representations internally. title: Residual Denoising Diffusion Models
